questionHtml: Using information from Table 1, calculate the price of this shirt in US$ in 2019.
markschemeHtml:
US dollar price = 400×184.5=4.7337…. [1]

Price in 2019 = ($) 4.73 [1]

An answer of 4.73 without working is sufficient for [1].

For full marks to be awarded, the response must provide valid working.
Units ($) need not be provided since they are stated in the question.

meta.title: Using information from Table 1, calculate the price of this shirt in US$ in 2019.
